visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a dimly lit indoor event venue dominated by vibrant purple neon spotlights and structural metallic scaffolding. Two security guards in black suits with earpieces walk past the camera. In the bottom-left corner, a circular video-call inset displays a man with glasses and a khaki cap smiling brightly. (2) The camera pans right as a woman in a tiered white dress and a sparkling knit beanie walks through the crowd. Behind her, a tall man in a long black overcoat and a black turtleneck scarf appears, smiling warmly and gesturing with his hands toward the onlookers while walking. (3) The man in the black coat turns away, moving deeper into the venue's brightly lit hall with a white angular ceiling. He is surrounded by security personnel and a crowd of people holding up smartphones to capture photos, with the camera following his back as he walks toward the exit.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in the inset, 1 male celebrity, 1 female celebrity, and at least 12 crowd members and security staff.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One man in a circular inset wearing a cap and glasses; one tall male celebrity in a black designer overcoat and turtleneck; one female celebrity in a white ruffled dress and silver beanie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern architectural interior with dark metallic pipes, purple stage lighting, and a transition into a brighter, white-walled corridor with recessed lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy ambient crowd noise, including high-pitched cheering and scattered laughter. A male voice very close to the microphone repeatedly shouts 'Hyeong! Hyeong!' in Korean with an excited, rising intonation. There is no background music, only the acoustic texture of a large indoor event space. (2) A sharp mechanical shutter click SFX punctuates the audio as the male shouting subsides. A professional female announcer's voice then dominates the mix via a loudspeaker, speaking in clear Traditional Chinese. She maintains a steady, formal narrative tone while referencing names and designer attributes, overlaid on a bed of murmuring crowd chatter.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To capture and share a fan's-eye view or vlog interaction with South Korean actor Lee Soo-hyuk during a high-profile brand or fashion event in Taiwan.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video features actor Lee Soo-hyuk and singer Lisa (suggested by the visual of the woman in white) at a public event. The inset influencer is likely '3CTim', a tech/lifestyle content creator.
